narrative_beat: O segundo cavaleiro do Apocalipse em versão moderna — guerra e IA fundidas em uma única visão épica de destruição

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: side angle, horse and rider in profile moving left to right
shot.depth_of_field: horse and rider sharp, fire columns and city background blurred

subject.primary: crimson war horse rearing up on hind legs, powerful and massive, rider in blood-red plate armor raising a long sword toward the sky
subject.focal_point: the horse's rearing front legs and rider's raised sword arm at peak of motion
subject.secondary: massive columns of fire behind the horse and rider, some column bases visible at edge of ruined buildings
props: blood-red plate armor on rider with gold trim detailing
long broadsword raised high catching fire light
crimson and amber horse with mane flying
floating orange embers swirling around horse and rider

environment.time_of_day: apocalyptic — no natural light, only fire light
environment.atmosphere: total apocalyptic destruction, the rider bringing war upon the modern world

composition.rule: dynamic diagonal — horse rearing from bottom-left to upper-right, Ken Burns slow pull-back to reveal full destruction scope
composition.foreground: crimson horse and rider in rich blood-red and amber tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white ruined megalopolis — collapsed skyscrapers, toppled structures, rubble silhouettes, fire columns stripped of color except at base where they meet the foreground

lighting.key_light: massive fire columns providing warm amber-crimson key light from right side
lighting.fill_light: reflected fire glow from rubble and ruined buildings from left side, slightly cooler amber
lighting.rim_light: intense crimson rim light from background fire silhouetting the entire horse and rider outline
lighting.mood: apocalyptic triumph of destruction, the inevitability of war

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: epic dread, the terrible beauty of apocalyptic power

symbolism.primary: the red horse rider of Revelation 6:4 — given power to take peace from the earth — now riding through a modern city
symbolism.secondary: the ruined megalopolis shows the AI age's wars are destroying civilization from within

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
